text:
## Issue: kapow-6vz — Implement internal/namematch Tier 1 (deterministic)

Package: tools/kapow/internal/namematch/ (module at `tools/kapow`)

Deterministic institution name matching (~95% of matches).

Files:
- matcher.go — Load all institutions + aliases from DB into memory maps. 3-tier lookup: exact lowercased name → normalized name → alias. Also MatchByOPE6/MatchByOPE8.
- normalize.go — Lowercase, strip diacritics (x/text/transform), remove "The ", strip punctuation, collapse whitespace.
- aliases.go — ~1000 hardcoded alias overrides for institutions whose external names differ from NCES canonical names (e.g. "Arizona State University" → "Arizona State University - Tempe").

Unit tests for normalization; integration test for full matcher load + lookup.

Done when: Unit tests pass; integration test resolves known aliases → correct unit_id.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/namematch"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Existing context

The directory `tools/kapow/internal/namematch/` exists but is empty.
The module has `golang.org/x/text` available (already in go.mod) for diacritics stripping.
The dbutil package at `tools/kapow/internal/dbutil/` provides `Connect()` and pgxpool utilities.

The DB schema has `search_base.institution` table with columns including `unit_id`, `institution_name`, `ope6_id`, `ope8_id`. Check `api/migrations/00001_initial_schema.sql` for exact schema.

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)

```bash
cd tools/kapow && go test -short ./internal/namematch/... -v -race -count=1
cd tools/kapow && go vet ./...
```

## Instructions
- Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions
- Write implementation code AND comprehensive unit tests
- Integration tests should skip with `-short` or when `DATABASE_URL` is unset
- Error wrapping: `fmt.Errorf("namematch: context: %w", err)`
- For the aliases, start with a representative set of ~50-100 common aliases (the full 1000 can be expanded later). Focus on well-known universities with common alternate names.
- Commit your work on the worktree branch with a descriptive message
- Report back with quality gate results when done

feat: implement tools/kapow/internal/namematch package

Deterministic institution name matching via 3-tier lookup:
1. Exact lowercase match
2. Normalized match (diacritics stripped, punctuation removed)
3. Builtin alias overrides (~75 entries for common external-source names)
4. DB alias fallback from search_base.institution_alias

Also provides MatchByOPE6/MatchByOPE8 for direct OPE ID lookups.
Unit tests cover all tiers; integration test skips without DATABASE_URL.

Issues: kapow-6vz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit namematch implementation"},"permission_updates":[]}}
